---
title: "lalu Thomas"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lalu-thomas-a7480597/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/LaluThomas
---

I’m Lalu — a CPA‑qualified accountant who learned early on that spreadsheets can only take us so far. I’ve spent years working in finance and accounting, and along the way I’ve become passionate about using technology to make work faster, clearer, and a lot more enjoyable.
